# castai_ai_optimizer_model_specs (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# HuggingFace model specs
resource "castai_ai_optimizer_model_specs" "hf_example" {
  model         = "llama-3.1-8b-instruct"
  registry_type = "HUGGING_FACE"
  type          = "chat"
  routable      = true

  huggingface {
    model_name = "meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct"
  }
}

# Private (S3) model specs
resource "castai_ai_optimizer_model_specs" "private_example" {
  model         = "my-custom-model"
  registry_type = "PRIVATE"

  private_registry {
    base_model_id = "my-custom-model"
    registry_id   = castai_ai_optimizer_model_registry.example.id
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model` (String) Model name.
- `registry_type` (String) Registry type: HUGGING_FACE or PRIVATE.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Model description.
- `huggingface` (Block List, Max: 1) HuggingFace registry configuration. Required when registry_type is HUGGING_FACE. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--huggingface))
- `private_registry` (Block List, Max: 1) Private registry configuration. Required when registry_type is PRIVATE. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--private_registry))
- `routable` (Boolean) Whether the model is routable.
- `type` (String) Model type (chat, embeddings, completion, etc.).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--huggingface"></a>
### Nested Schema for `huggingface`

Required:

- `model_name` (String) HuggingFace model name (e.g. meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct).


<a id="nestedblock--private_registry"></a>
### Nested Schema for `private_registry`

Required:

- `base_model_id` (String) Base model identifier.
- `registry_id` (String) ID of the castai_ai_optimizer_model_registry resource.
